name: Crab Combination Soup#1
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Fresh or thawed frozen Crabmeat
1/2 cup Drained whole or sliced Bamboo shoots (1/2 of 8 oz Can)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place mushrooms in a bowl and cover with boiling water. Let stand for 30 minutes. Drain. Remove and discard stems. Cut caps into thin slices.
2. Flake crabmeat. Rinse scallops with water, drain, and cut into thin slices. Cut bamboo shoots into thin strips. Chop green onions.
3. Heat oil in a small omelet or crepe pan. Add eggs and tilt the pan so the egg completely covers the bottom. Cook over medium-high heat until the egg is set. Loosen edges and turn the omelet over to cook the other side. Remove from the pan, roll up, and cut into thin strips.
4. Pour broth into a 3-quart saucepan. Cook over high heat until the broth boils. Stir in mushrooms, crabmeat, scallops, bamboo shoots, onions, sliced egg, ginger, and pepper. Return soup to boil.
5. Combine cornstarch, 4 tablespoons of water, rice wine (or dry sherry), and soy sauce. Stir mixture into soup. Return soup to boil.
6. Beat egg whites and remaining 2 tablespoons water. Drizzle egg whites slowly into soup while stirring the soup vigorously.
Makes 6 servings.
